跳过导航链接
  • 概览
  • 程序包
  • 类
  • 树
  • 索引
  • 帮助
SEARCH

序列化表格

  • 程序包 system

    • 类 system.Application

      class Application extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • 序列化字段

        • applicationId
          String applicationId
          Unique identifier for this application
        • applyTime
          String applyTime
          Timestamp when the application was submitted
        • jobId
          String jobId
          ID of the job being applied for
        • status
          String status
          Current status: "PENDING", "ACCEPTED", or "REJECTED"
        • taEmail
          String taEmail
          Email of the TA who submitted this application

    • 类 system.DashboardFrame

      class DashboardFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • currentUser
          User currentUser
          The currently logged-in user
        • users
          List<User> users
          List of all users in the system

    • 类 system.Job

      class Job extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • 序列化字段

        • applicantLimit
          int applicantLimit
          Maximum number of applicants allowed
        • deadline
          String deadline
          Application deadline in "yyyy-MM-dd" format
        • description
          String description
          Description of the TA duties
        • jobId
          String jobId
          Unique identifier for this job
        • moduleCode
          String moduleCode
          Module code (e.g., "COMP2201")
        • moduleName
          String moduleName
          Full module name (e.g., "Software Engineering")
        • moEmail
          String moEmail
          Email of the Module Organizer who created this job
        • requirements
          String requirements
          Requirements for applicants
        • skills
          List<String> skills
          List of required/preferred skills
        • status
          String status
          Current status: "OPEN" or "CLOSED"
        • weeklyHours
          int weeklyHours
          Weekly hours required for this position

    • 类 system.LoginFrame

      class LoginFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • emailField
          JTextField emailField
          Email input field
        • passwordField
          JPasswordField passwordField
          Password input field
        • passwordToggleBtn
          JToggleButton passwordToggleBtn
          Toggle button to show/hide password
        • users
          List<User> users
          List of registered users

    • 类 system.Notification

      class Notification extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • 序列化字段

        • content
          String content
          Notification content/body
        • createTime
          String createTime
          Timestamp when the notification was created
        • notificationId
          String notificationId
          Unique identifier for this notification
        • read
          boolean read
          Whether the notification has been read
        • recipientEmail
          String recipientEmail
          Email of the notification recipient
        • title
          String title
          Notification title/subject
        • type
          String type
          Notification type (e.g., "ACCEPT", "REJECT", "APPLY", "INFO")

    • 类 system.NotificationFrame

      class NotificationFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • currentUser
          User currentUser
          The currently logged-in user
        • listPanel
          JPanel listPanel
          Panel containing individual notification cards
        • notifications
          List<Notification> notifications
          List of notifications for the current user
        • notificationsPanel
          JPanel notificationsPanel
          Panel containing the notifications list
        • onReadChangeCallback
          Runnable onReadChangeCallback
          Callback to be executed when read status changes (e.g., update dashboard badge)

    • 类 system.Profile

      class Profile extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • 序列化字段

        • cvPath
          String cvPath
          Path to uploaded CV file
        • description
          String description
          Self-description/bio
        • email
          String email
          Email of the TA (links to User account)
        • grade
          String grade
          Academic grade/classification
        • major
          String major
          Major/degree program
        • phone
          String phone
          Phone number
        • skills
          List<String> skills
          List of skills
        • studentId
          String studentId
          Student ID number

    • 类 system.RegisterFrame

      class RegisterFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • confirmErrorLabel
          JLabel confirmErrorLabel
          Error label for confirm password validation
        • confirmPasswordField
          JPasswordField confirmPasswordField
          Confirm password input field
        • confirmToggleBtn
          JToggleButton confirmToggleBtn
          Toggle button to show/hide confirm password
        • confirmValid
          boolean confirmValid
          Flag indicating if confirm password matches
        • emailErrorLabel
          JLabel emailErrorLabel
          Error label for email validation
        • emailField
          JTextField emailField
          Email input field
        • emailValid
          boolean emailValid
          Flag indicating if email is valid
        • nameErrorLabel
          JLabel nameErrorLabel
          Error label for name validation
        • nameField
          JTextField nameField
          Name input field
        • nameValid
          boolean nameValid
          Flag indicating if name is valid
        • passwordErrorLabel
          JLabel passwordErrorLabel
          Error label for password validation
        • passwordField
          JPasswordField passwordField
          Password input field
        • passwordToggleBtn
          JToggleButton passwordToggleBtn
          Toggle button to show/hide password
        • passwordValid
          boolean passwordValid
          Flag indicating if password is valid
        • roleCombo
          JComboBox<String> roleCombo
          Role selection combo box
        • users
          List<User> users
          List of existing users

    • 类 system.User

      class User extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • 序列化字段

        • email
          String email
          The user's email address, used as the unique identifier
        • name
          String name
          The user's display name
        • password
          String password
          The user's password for authentication
        • role
          String role
          The user's role: "TA", "MO", or "ADMIN"

  • 程序包 system.admin

      class AdminManageWorkloadFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • allApps
          List<Application> allApps
          List of all applications
        • allJobs

          List<Profile> allProfiles
          List of all TA profiles

          JPanel mainPanel
          Main content panel
        • users
          List<User> users
          List of all users in the system

      class AdminViewAllJobsFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • allJobs
          List<Job> allJobs
          List of all jobs in the system

          JComboBox<String> statusFilter

          JPanel tableContainer
          Container for the table

      class AdminViewAllTAsFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

          JLabel countLabel

      class MOEditJobFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

    • 类 system.mo.MOMyJobsFrame

      class MOMyJobsFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • 序列化字段

        • currentUser
          User currentUser
          The currently logged-in user (Module Organizer)
        • jobTable
          JTable jobTable
          Table displaying the jobs
        • myJobs
          List<Job> myJobs
          List of jobs posted by this MO

          DefaultTableModel tableModel
          Table model for the jobs table

      class TAApplicationStatusFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

          List of all jobs
